Dialog.name: TRL_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 45}You are now able to {f 0 1 2}Crumble{f 0 1 27} breakable objects while exploring.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 45}While in the {f 0 1 2}assault state{f 0 1 27}, you will destroy breakable objects simply by making contact with them. Keep in mind, however, that Shadows will not be affected by Crumble in any way.[n]{f 1 1}
